expectations.evidence: Full listing block produced: '🏷️ 3-Seater Dark Brown Leather Couch — $350' with complete description and seller notes.

Description includes 'Some visible wear on the armrests (normal for a well-loved sofa)'. Seller notes tip says 'Take a close-up of the armrest wear and include it; buyers who see it upfront don't haggle as hard as those who discover it in person.' Flaw is disclosed in the listing body.

Description explicitly states 'Buyer must organise a ute or van — this is a heavy piece and cannot be carried in a sedan.' Seller notes tip also says 'List under "Sofas"... mention "ute/van required" in the title or first line so you don't waste time on buyers without a vehicle.' Transport requirement is prominent.

Output has: 🏷️ header, Title: line, Price: $350 ono line, Description: block, '—— seller notes (not for the ad) ——' separator, and '• Target: ~$300 | Floor: $260 | Garage sale: $150' three-price breakdown. All required fields present.

notes: Clean 4/4. Transport requirement clearly stated in the listing body, armrest wear disclosed upfront, correct format.
